title: Feather Duster Extendable 35-110cm Ostrich Feather Dusters For Cleaning, Long Duster For High Ceilings,Lamps, Cabinets, Furniture
features: 【Feather Duster Extendable:】Our feather duster can be freely retractable, from 31cm to 110cm, from low objects to the ceiling, you can adjust the length of the pole for cleaning, no need for escalators, safer and more convenient

【Deep Dust Removal: 】Our extendable duster uses natural South African ostrich feathers, which is soft and tough, and the full down locks in dust and does not raise ash.Anti-static properties prevent dust from scattering and protect electronic devices

【Sturdy and Durable:】The telescopic rod is made of stainless steel, which is strong and rust-proof, and the ostrich feather dusters interface adopts the flocking process, which is independently reinforced, does not shed hair, and extends the service life

【Multifunctional cleaning:】The thick feathers ensure efficient cleaning, and the narrow corners and hard-to-reach highly soft feathers are easily reached without other tools. This extendable duster is ideal for your home, office and car maintenance

【Correct instructions for use and care:】 After receiving it, you can put the feather duster in the sun to dry or wash and dry directly to make the feathers more fluffy. After use, rotate to shake off the dust, or wash and dry
description: The dusters for cleaning is made of South African natural ostrich feathers, which is deeply dust-proof and anti-static.Telescopic rod design makes dust removal at high altitude safer and simpler. Ostrich feather duster extendable can clean the entire house. Not only can it clean the desktop, but it can also reach places that cannot be reached from high places such as ceilings, ceiling fans, blinds, etc. Ideal for households, offices, and car maintenance. Note: Choosing feathers that naturally fall off the ostrich's body will not cause harm to the ostrich. specification： Package size: 60×20×20cm/23.6×7.87×7.87in Color: black Material: stainless steel, ostrich feathers, plastic
